FA28BD954E75B54F2E5F77A0CEB5A2A9: ''Between you and me, I think Grogu is getting a little sick of being stuck to my back all day. Holding his nose, waving his hand. Just rude, really. We might need a bigger distraction... could you build him a <empha>Cannon</>? Don't worry, he's used worse.''
0E72209B4831E7E12A7CE2A280689270: ''Bleh, petting creatures lasted about ten seconds before Grogu got distracted. Kids, am I right? Could you gather some Copper Ore from the Grasslands Caves or Dry Valley Caves? When all else fails, just give him something shiny to keep him happy.”
EE078DD54CFB7EE9FAA34F87AC43B317: ''Can't believe I'm still getting bounty requests while on this trip! Someone has asked me to go defeat a big honkin’ <empha>Rancor</>. Do me a solid and defeat one for me? You can find one in <empha>any biome</> on the Mainland. I'll make it worth your while!''
BF5C3018480E7B5CC21B30BB1FE5972F: ''Could you craft Grogu a <empha>Wrench</>? If we don't give him one as a souvenir, he'll find one to take on his own. Before you know it, the shifter knob for your spaceship will have drool all over it...''
53765B33439609A44744CFA8F168F6CA: ''Could you grab some <empha>Slurp Mushrooms</> from <empha>Caves</>? Hope you didn't think that Grogu would be full already. Eats like an exogorth, this one.''
31F3F52449933497A254B68E8180ACC3: ''Grogu’s been petting the everliving crud out of any creature he can find, and now he’s insisting that you pet some creatures too. Some <empha>Banthas</> have been sighted in the area lately, go <empha>pet them</> and gather their <emphA>Heavy Wool</>.''
354558534003C6A2F5F105B0064C712A: ''Have you been seeing these <empha>Kyber Crystals</> that the <empha>Imperials</> and creatures from our galaxy got their hands on? They're used to craft <empha>Lightsabers</>. Might be a good addition to your arsenal, try crafting one now!''
A2E7399F42543C7C1A122C9C2F279888: ''I swear, you set the guy down for one second and he just zips off… Would you mind grabbing some Glowing Peppers from the the Dry Valley? It’ll keep him fed for a while... and it'll be way easier for me to keep track of him once he’s glowing.''
8C498D17464E02BB874742B6368AF95F: ''I think we both agree that Lil G doesn’t need more energy, but he’s demanding some of those Hasty Slapberries that grow by The Shore. It’s vacation! What harm could an extra treat do? I mean, a lot, when it comes to him. But I'm willing to try.''
0DCF4EA04B34E6CFA1ED339CF8100B2C: ''It never stops with these Empire guys! All these <empha>Stormtroopers</> are out looking for us. Bruh. We're trying to relax. Could you go clear some of them out for me? They're skulking around <emphA>every biome</> right now.''
C0FDD38842D2DEA9D21E909A4454AD9C: ''My curiosity is getting the best of me. I keep hearing about this exotic dish that the locals call <empha>Mighty Pizza</>. Would you cook one up for us? I'll have to eat it in private. Half because I can't show my face, half because I expect I'll get real sloppy devouring it all in one go.''
80F4C399493C9F30043D02BC383CDBE4: ''So, we love your Village. Very aesthetic, very cool… but there’s so much more to see around this place. Could you build us a <empha>Hover Vehicle</> for a little sightseeing?''
3E87398D40704887FF010CB0836A0F71: ''There we go… I’ve tuned my Comlink directly to your <empha>Journal</>! Come meet us in one of your <empha>Villages</> on the Mainland or on <Yel>Star Wars Island</>. I’ll be the one carrying a little dude who’s green, with giant ears, and has enormous black eyes that stare directly into your soul. Be quick about it, Grogu’s antsy to kick this vacation off! -The Vacatialorian & Max-n-relax-gu''
E2775BF443D99FD2C29A7198AFED4F73: ''These Empire knuckleheads just won't get the message. Now they've got <empha>AWR Troopers</> looking for us <empha>on nighttime patrols</> throughout the whole island. WE. ARE. ON. VA-CA-TION. Would you go defeat them so we can finish our vacation in peace?''
12AD19EA45B2BFD9FAAB0FA5BA2FC67A: ''Well, that took no time at all… his appetite has arrived. May the Force have mercy on us all. Would you mind catching some <empha>Fish</> for Grogu?''
84208F8F42AC5D2C7F6AE5A1B7C167CF: ''We’ve been ordering all this room service but we forgot to order an actual room. Could you build us a <empha>Mos Espa Guided Build</> to stay in? Not looking for anything fancy, anything beats sleeping in a little metal tube that’s hurtling through space.''
FD93A6F24A3A780BF5B6D8A411DEAE42: A man of few words and a little green guy of even fewer words. Pursued by Imperial forces, they crash landed here and are catching some much needed R&R.
